name: Collov AI
tagline: Affordable AI virtual staging at $16/month for 60 staged photos
description:
Collov AI is a virtual staging service that uses artificial intelligence to digitally furnish and decorate empty rooms in property photos. It provides real estate agents, homeowners, and property managers with a fast, cost-effective way to showcase a space's potential to buyers. The core service transforms blank or outdated listing photos into realistically staged images, helping buyers visualize themselves living there, which can lead to faster sales and higher perceived value.

Key features include its ability to generate high-quality staged photos that rival more expensive traditional methods. Beyond basic furniture addition, standout tools allow you to change major elements like flooring and cabinet finishes, or swap existing furniture for different styles. Another notable feature is the ability to create AI-generated virtual tour videos from a series of still photos, adding dynamic appeal to listings.

A clear use case is for an agent listing a vacant home. Instead of renting physical furniture, they upload photos of the empty rooms to Collov AI. They select a modern design style, and within a short time, receive professionally staged images. They can also use the editing tools to update the kitchen's oak cabinets to a white shaker style to match current buyer preferences. This entire process costs significantly less than traditional staging or high-end virtual staging services, while delivering comparable, market-ready visuals.
